data.title: Donna M. Brester recognized as Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for contributions in critical nursing care.
data.description: A nurse named Donna M. Brester, who holds various qualifications including MSN, RN, CCRN, NPDS, has been recognized as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member for her work in Critical Nursing Care. The acknowledgment was featured in The Inner Circle and highlights Donna's role as a Compassionate Caregiver and Advocate. This news was released on October 9, 2025, in Kensington, Connecticut.

data.title: Dale T. Bristow named Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for Rehabilitation and Disability Management.
data.description: In Rochester, Washington on October 9, 2025, Dale T. Bristow has been celebrated as a distinguished Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence in The Inner Circle due to his notable achievements in Rehabilitation and Disability Management. Bristow's remarkable contributions spanning over a significant period have garnered this prestigious recognition.

data.title: Dr. Sathish Karmegam, MD, MMM, FACP acknowledged as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for Health & Wellness contributions.
data.description: In Denton, Texas, on October 9, 2025, Sathish Karmegam, MD, MMM, FACP, was recognized as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for his dedication to Health & Wellness. Dr. Karmegam, a renowned internist and nephrologist, has made significant contributions in his field.

data.title: Edward "Ted" B. Brown III acknowledged as Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for Business Continuity.
data.description: In State College, Pennsylvania on October 9, 2025, Edward "Ted" B. Brown III has been recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence in The Inner Circle for his notable work in Business Continuity and Crisis Management Consulting. Ted Brown is acknowledged for his impact in this field, establishing himself as a prominent figure in the industry.

data.title: Pamela K. Thompson, RN recognized as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member by The Inner Circle for advocating patient-centered care.
data.description: In Melbourne, Florida on October 9, 2025, Pamela K. Thompson, RN received recognition as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member in The Inner Circle for her advocacy work in Patient-Centered Care Through Medical Utilization Management. This acknowledgment highlights her significant contributions to the field.

data.title: Sandstorm Gold Royalties shareholders approve plan of arrangement with Royal Gold. Voting results reported on October 9, 2025.
data.description: Today, on October 9, 2025, in Vancouver, BC, Sandstorm Gold Ltd. ("Sandstorm Gold Royalties" or "Sandstorm") (NYSE: SAND) (TSX: SSL) announced the outcome of the voting at their Special Meeting of Shareholders. The meeting revealed significant results for the Company.

data.title: RB Global (NYSE: RBA, TSX: RBA) will report Q3 2025 results on Nov 6, with a conference call at 4:30 pm Eastern time.
data.description: RB Global, Inc. shared that it is set to unveil its third-quarter 2025 financial results post-market closure on Thursday, November 6, 2025. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 4:30 p.m. Eastern time to delve into the outcomes. Interested analysts and institutional investors have the option to pre-register for the conference call via a provided link. (***characters: 308)

data.title: Registration open for Miyahthon in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia aiming to boost water sustainability innovation.
data.description: Registration is ongoing for the second installment of the "Miyahthon" event in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. This initiative aims to promote innovation in water sustainability. The event is set to gather experts and enthusiasts to address challenges in the water sector. Interested individuals can still sign up to participate in this event, which is geared towards advancing sustainable water solutions.

data.title: Reddit to announce Q3 2025 results on Oct 30, 2025. Conference call at 2pm PT/5pm ET. Webcast at investor.redditinc.com.
data.description: Reddit, Inc. (NYSE: RDDT) of San Francisco revealed that their financial report for the third quarter of 2025 will be made public after the market closes on Thursday, October 30, 2025. The company is scheduled to conduct a conference call on the same day at 2 p.m. PT / 5 p.m. ET to discuss these results. The conference call will be live-streamed on Reddit’s Investor Relations website at investor.redditinc.com and the investor relations subreddit r/RDDT. A playback of the call will also be available.

data.title: Snap Inc. will hold Q3 2025 financial results conference call on Nov 5, 2025, 2:00 p.m. PT, accessible on their website.
data.description: Snap Inc. (NYSE: SNAP) is scheduled to discuss its third quarter 2025 financial results during a quarterly conference call on Wednesday, November 5, 2025, at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Time). The live webcast and replay of the conference call will be available on Snap Inc.’s Investor Relations website for a minimum of 90 days at http://investor.snap.com. Snap Inc. is a tech company that views the camera as a significant opportunity for growth.

data.title: Aritzia Inc. (TSX: ATZ) reports second quarter fiscal 2026 financial results, ending August, with significant growth.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 9, 2025, Aritzia Inc. (TSX: ATZ), a leading design house known for its Everyday Luxury™ offerings both online and in physical stores, unveiled its financial performance for the second quarter concluding in August. No specific numbers were mentioned in the original text provided.

data.title: Clean Energy Fuels Corp. (Nasdaq: CLNE) to report Q3 2025 results on Nov 4 at market close, followed by a 1:30 p.m. Pacific Time conference call. President and CEO Andrew J. Littlefair and CFO Robert M. Vreeland to host.
data.description: Clean Energy Fuels Corp (CLNE) will be revealing its financial performance for the third quarter of 2025 on November 4, 2025, post-market closure. An investor conference call is set for 4:30 p.m. EST (1:30 p.m. PST) on the same day. Leading the call will be President and CEO Andrew J. Littlefair alongside CFO Robert M. Vreeland. For those looking to join the live call, dial 1 [Contact number not provided].

data.title: SRP and ESS introduce 50 MWh long duration energy storage project in Arizona, including a five MW battery system.
data.description: In Wilsonville, Oregon, Salt River Project (SRP) and ESS have revealed a partnership to introduce Project New Horizon, a 5 MW, 50 MWh battery system, to the grid. SRP, a non-profit public power provider in the greater Phoenix area, teamed up with ESS, a top manufacturer of iron flow long-duration energy storage systems, for this pilot project. The installation will take place at SRP's Copper Crossing Energy and Research Center in Florence, Arizona.

data.title: Atlassian to report Q1 FY2026 results on Oct 30, 2025, after market close. Conference call at 2PM PT.
data.description: Atlassian Corporation (NASDAQ: TEAM), a renowned provider of team collaboration and productivity software, is set to unveil its financial outcomes for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026 that concluded on September 30, 2025. The disclosure will take place post-market closure on Thursday, October 30, 2025. A conference call to deliberate on these financial results is scheduled for 2:00 P.M. Pacific Time. Alongside the earnings press release, Atlassian intends to share details for shareholders.

data.title: Tigo Energy (NASDAQ: TYGO) to attend LD Micro Main Event XIX Conference on Oct 20, 2025 in San Diego, CA at 4:00 P.M. PT.
data.description: Tigo Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: TYGO), a reputable provider of smart solar and energy software solutions, shared details about its participation in the LD Micro Main Event XIX Conference. The event is set to take place on Monday, October 20, 2025, in San Diego, CA. During the conference, CFO Bill Roeschlein will conduct a company presentation at 4:00 P.M. PT on the same day. Additionally, he will be open for 1-on-1 meetings throughout the event. This conference provides a platform for Tigo to showcase its innovative solutions to potential investors and stakeholders.

data.title: Block, Inc. to announce Q3 2025 results on Nov 6 after market close, with conference call at 2pm PT / 5pm ET.
data.description: Oakland, California – Block, Inc. (NYSE: XYZ) is set to announce its financial performance for the third quarter of 2025 on Thursday, November 6, 2025, after the market closes. Following this, the company will conduct a conference call and earnings webcast at 2:00 p.m. PT / 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day to delve into the results. To join the conference call or access the live audio webcast, individuals are encouraged to visit the Events & Presentations section of Block’s website.

data.title: Butterfly Network appoints John Doherty as Chief Financial Officer, effective December 8, 2025, bringing 25 years of experience.
data.description: In Burlington, Massachusetts and New York, a digital health company, Butterfly Network, Inc. (NYSE: BFLY), has appointed John Doherty as the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer starting from December 8, 2025. Doherty brings over 25 years of financial leadership experience to Butterfly, having worked with public and private companies globally, overseeing significant growth, transformation, and strategic initiatives.

data.title: Guardant Health (Nasdaq: GH) will report Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 29; webcast at 1:30 pm Pacific / 4:30 pm Eastern.
data.description: Guardant Health, Inc. (Nasdaq: GH), a prominent precision oncology firm based in Palo Alto, California, unveiled plans to disclose its financial performance for Q3 2025 post-market closure on Wednesday, October 29, 2025. The management will conduct a webcasted conference call starting at 1:30 p.m. PT / 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day. Interested individuals can access the live audio of the webcast via the company's website under the "Investors" section at www.guardanthealth.com.

data.title: IMAX Corp (NYSE: IMAX) to discuss Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 23 at 8:30 am Eastern Time via webcast and telephone.
data.description: IMAX Corporation (NYSE: IMAX) disclosed plans for a conference call to review its third quarter 2025 financial outcomes on Thursday, October 23rd at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The call will be webcasted and viewable at the link: https://www.imax.com/content/investor-relations. Those wishing to join via telephone must pre-register through: https://register-conf.media-server.com/register/BIdeefa35cbfb744abbe2b1d5d16ab7b.

data.title: Udemy (Nasdaq: UDMY) to reveal Q3 2025 results on Oct 29 at 2pm PT / 5pm ET. Webcast available.
data.description: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Udemy (Nasdaq: UDMY), a prominent AI-driven skills enhancement platform, revealed plans to disclose its Q3 financial outcomes on October 29, 2025, after market closure. The live conference call and webcast discussing the results are set for 2 p.m. PT / 5 p.m. ET the same day. Interested parties can access all related financial documents, the live webcast, and a recorded replay of the call on the “Quarterly Results” section of Udemy's website.
